sentences.target: J'ai reçu un télégramme ce matin.

translations.fr: J'ai reçu un télégramme ce matin.
translations.en: I received a telegram this morning.
translations.de: Ich habe heute Morgen ein Telegramm erhalten.
translations.it: Ho ricevuto un telegramma questa mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上收到了一封电报。
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi nhận được một bức điện.
translations.nl: Ik heb vanmorgen een telegram ontvangen.
translations.hi: मैंने आज सुबह एक तार प्राप्त किया।
translations.el: Έλαβα ένα τηλεγράφημα σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg mottok et telegram i morges.
translations.sv: Jag fick ett telegram i morse.
translations.ro: Am primit o telegramă azi dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg modtog et telegram i morges.
translations.ja: 今朝、電報を受け取りました。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun (1st person singular) elided before a vowel-initial word; functions as the subject.
Auxiliary verb (1st person singular present) used to form the passé composé with the following past participle.
Past participle serving as the main lexical verb in a compound tense with 'avoir'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a countable noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb.
Demonstrative determiner modifying a temporal noun to mean 'this' (deictic).
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'ce' forms a temporal adverbial ('ce matin').

sentences.target: Tu peux envoyer un télégramme depuis ici.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ɑ̃.vwa.je œ̃ teleɡʁam də.pɥi i.si/

translations.fr: Tu peux envoyer un télégramme depuis ici.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ɑ̃.vwa.je œ̃ teleɡʁam də.pɥi i.si/
translations.en: You can send a telegram from here.
translations.es: Puedes enviar un telegrama desde aquí.
translations.de: Du kannst von hier ein Telegramm schicken.
translations.it: Puoi inviare un telegramma da qui.
translations.pt: Você pode enviar um telegrama daqui.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể gửi điện tín từ đây.
translations.nl: Je kunt vanaf hier een telegram versturen.
translations.hi: आप यहाँ से एक तार भेज सकते हैं।
translations.el: Μπορείς να στείλεις τηλεγράφημα από εδώ.
translations.nb: Du kan sende et telegram herfra.
translations.id: Anda bisa mengirim telegram dari sini.
translations.sv: Du kan skicka ett telegram härifrån.
translations.ro: Poți trimite o telegramă de aici.
translations.da: Du kan sende et telegram herfra.
translations.ja: ここから電報を送れます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite verb (2nd person singular present) expressing ability/permission; selects an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb complement governed by 'peux'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'envoyer'.
Preposition introducing a spatial origin/source phrase here.
Deictic adverb of place; complement of the preposition 'depuis'.

sentences.target: Il garde ce vieux télégramme de son grand-père.
sentences.reading: /il ɡaʁd sə vjø teleɡʁam də sɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃.pɛʁ/

translations.fr: Il garde ce vieux télégramme de son grand-père.
translations.ipa: /il ɡaʁd sə vjø teleɡʁam də sɔ̃ ɡʁɑ̃.pɛʁ/
translations.en: He keeps this old telegram from his grandfather.
translations.es: Él guarda este viejo telegrama de su abuelo.
translations.de: Er bewahrt dieses alte Telegramm von seinem Großvater auf.
translations.it: Lui conserva questo vecchio telegramma di suo nonno.
translations.ko: 그는 할아버지에게서 받은 이 오래된 전보를 간직하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他保留着祖父寄来的这封旧电报。
translations.yue: 佢保留住佢阿爺寄嚟嘅呢封舊電報。
translations.ru: Он хранит эту старую телеграмму от своего дедушки.
translations.pt: Ele guarda este velho telegrama do avô dele.
translations.he: הוא שומר את המברק הישן הזה מסבו.
translations.tr: Büyükbabasından gelen bu eski telgrafı saklıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy giữ bức điện cũ này do ông nội gửi.
translations.ar: هو يحتفظ بهذه البرقية القديمة من جده.
translations.nl: Hij bewaart dit oude telegram van zijn grootvader.
translations.uk: Він зберігає цю стару телеграму від свого діда.
translations.hu: Ő megőrzi ezt a régi táviratot a nagyapjától.
translations.hi: वह अपने दादा का यह पुराना तार संभाल कर रखता है।
translations.pl: On przechowuje ten stary telegram od swojego dziadka.
translations.el: Κρατά αυτό το παλιό τηλεγράφημα από τον παππού του.
translations.nb: Han tar vare på dette gamle telegrammet fra bestefaren sin.
translations.id: Dia menyimpan telegram lama ini dari kakeknya.
translations.sv: Han sparar detta gamla telegram från sin farfar.
translations.ro: El păstrează această veche telegramă de la bunicul său.
translations.cs: On uchovává tento starý telegram od svého dědečka.
translations.da: Han gemmer dette gamle telegram fra sin bedstefar.
translations.fi: Hän säilyttää tämän vanhan sähkeen isoisältään.
translations.ja: 彼は祖父からのこの古い電報を大切にしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present).
Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular, prenominal modifier of 'télégramme'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'garde'.
Preposition introducing a possessive/origin complement.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), agreeing with the following noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: On voit un télégramme au musée postal.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ teleɡʁam o my.ze pɔs.tal/

translations.fr: On voit un télégramme au musée postal.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ vwa œ̃ teleɡʁam o my.ze pɔs.tal/
translations.en: We see a telegram at the postal museum.
translations.es: Vemos un telegrama en el museo postal.
translations.de: Wir sehen ein Telegramm im Postmuseum.
translations.it: Vediamo un telegramma al museo postale.
translations.ko: 우편 박물관에서 전보를 볼 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在邮政博物馆看到一份电报。
translations.yue: 喺郵政博物館可以見到一封電報。
translations.ru: Мы видим телеграмму в почтовом музее.
translations.pt: Vemos um telegrama no museu postal.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy một bức điện ở bảo tàng bưu chính.
translations.nl: We zien een telegram in het postmuseum.
translations.uk: Ми бачимо телеграму в поштовому музеї.
translations.hi: हम डाक संग्रहालय में एक तार देखते हैं।
translations.el: Βλέπουμε ένα τηλεγράφημα στο ταχυδρομικό μουσείο.
translations.nb: Vi ser et telegram på postmuseet.
translations.id: Kami melihat sebuah telegram di museum pos.
translations.sv: Vi ser ett telegram på postmuseet.
translations.ro: Vedem o telegramă la muzeul poștal.
translations.da: Vi ser et telegram på postmuseet.
translations.ja: 私たちは郵便博物館で電報を見ます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, often used colloquially for 'we'.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular present).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'voit'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces a locative phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; noun head of the prepositional phrase indicating location.
Attributive adjective modifying 'musée'.
